title: African leaders call for dialogue amid escalating Iran crisis
author: James MULHOLLAND
fullText:

12:36 
 
 
 
 
 Issued on: 03/03/2026 - 22:37
 
 
 
 
 From the show
 
 
 
 

 

 
 
 
 In tonight's edition, the Global South widely condemns the war in Iran, with many countries accusing the US and Israel of violating international law and acting unilaterally. And the United States imposes sanctions on the Rwandan army and several top military officials over their role in fighting in the eastern Democratic ​Republic of Congo.  
 
 
 Produced by James Mullholland and Antonia Cimini
summary: In tonight's edition, the Global South widely condemns the war in Iran, with many countries accusing the US and Israel of violating international law and acting unilaterally. And the United States imposes sanctions on the Rwandan army and several top military officials over their role in fighting in the eastern Democratic ​Republic of Congo.
